raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 2,
    "R1.7": 3,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 3,
    "RX.5": 2
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent identifies the novelty of CalibVar but does not map against specific prior works; instead, it mentions 'prior approaches' and 'any prior method'.",
    "R1.7": "The agent flags one missing citation (CalibVar-v1) but does not audit every load-bearing citation.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim ('we are unaware of any prior method...') but does not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free but with one minor regression (overclaiming state-of-the-art performance without external comparators).",
    "RX.5": "The agent blends sources without traceability; major rewrites are traced, but minor edits are not."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 1,
    "RX.4": 0.7,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent identifies the novelty of CalibVar but does not map against specific prior works; instead, it mentions 'prior approaches' and 'any prior method'.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flags one missing citation (CalibVar-v1) but does not audit every load-bearing citation.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim ('we are unaware of any prior method...') but does not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free but with one minor regression (overclaiming state-of-the-art performance without external comparators).
rationale.RX.5: The agent blends sources without traceability; major rewrites are traced, but minor edits are not.
